SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.valve

Class ControlValveNoise_IEC_60534_8_3

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.valve.ControlValveNoise_IEC_60534_8_3
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ControlValveNoise_IEC_60534_8_3 extends Object implements Serializable
Aerodynamic (gas/vapour) control-valve noise prediction following the procedure of IEC 60534-8-3. The method estimates the external A-weighted sound pressure level one metre downstream of the valve outlet, accounting for the flow regime (subsonic through fully developed supersonic, regimes I-V), the acoustical conversion efficiency, the internal sound power, and the transmission loss through the downstream pipe wall.

The calculation chain is:

  1. Pressure ratios and identification of the flow regime from the actual pressure drop ratio versus the critical ratios.
  2. Mechanical stream power of the flow, Wm = (ṁ · Uvc2) / 2.
  3. Acoustical efficiency factor ηf from the regime.
  4. Internal sound power and internal sound pressure level.
  5. Pipe-wall transmission loss and external sound pressure level (re 20 µPa).
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ControlValveNoise_IEC_60534_8_3

      public ControlValveNoise_IEC_60534_8_3()
      Default constructor for ControlValveNoise_IEC_60534_8_3.

  • Method Details

    • setFlowConditions

      public void setFlowConditions(double massFlowKgS, double inletPressurePa, double outletPressurePa, double inletDensityKgM3, double outletDensityKgM3)
      Sets the flow and fluid conditions.
      Parameters:
      massFlowKgS - mass flow rate in kg/s (must be > 0)
      inletPressurePa - inlet absolute pressure in Pa (must be > 0)
      outletPressurePa - outlet absolute pressure in Pa (must be > 0 and < inlet)
      inletDensityKgM3 - inlet density in kg/m3 (must be > 0)
      outletDensityKgM3 - outlet density in kg/m3 (must be > 0)

    • setAcousticProperties

      public void setAcousticProperties(double inletSonic, double outletSonic, double isentropicExp)
      Sets the fluid acoustic properties.
      Parameters:
      inletSonic - speed of sound at inlet in m/s (must be > 0)
      outletSonic - speed of sound at the vena contracta/outlet in m/s (must be > 0)
      isentropicExp - isentropic exponent k = Cp/Cv (must be > 1)

    • setGeometry

      public void setGeometry(double valveOutletDiameterM, double pipeIdM, double pipeWallThicknessM)
      Sets the valve and downstream pipe geometry.
      Parameters:
      valveOutletDiameterM - valve outlet internal diameter in meters (must be > 0)
      pipeIdM - downstream pipe internal diameter in meters (must be > 0)
      pipeWallThicknessM - downstream pipe wall thickness in meters (must be > 0)

    • setValveCoefficients

      public void setValveCoefficients(double fl, double fd)
      Sets the valve coefficients.
      Parameters:
      fl - liquid pressure recovery factor FL (0-1, must be > 0)
      fd - valve-style modifier Fd (must be > 0)

    • regimeEfficiency

      private double regimeEfficiency(int regime, double machVc)
      Returns the acoustical efficiency factor for the identified flow regime per IEC 60534-8-3.
      Parameters:
      regime - flow regime number (1-5)
      machVc - Mach number at the vena contracta
      Returns:
      acoustical efficiency factor (dimensionless)

    • calcNoise

      public void calcNoise()
      Runs the IEC 60534-8-3 aerodynamic noise calculation.

    • getSoundPressureLevelDbA

      public double getSoundPressureLevelDbA()
      Returns the external A-weighted sound pressure level at one metre.
      Returns:
      sound pressure level in dBA

    • getOutletMach

      public double getOutletMach()
      Returns the outlet (vena contracta) Mach number.
      Returns:
      outlet Mach number (dimensionless)

    • getFlowRegime

      public int getFlowRegime()
      Returns the identified flow regime (1-5).
      Returns:
      flow regime number

    • getMechanicalStreamPower

      public double getMechanicalStreamPower()
      Returns the mechanical stream power of the flow.
      Returns:
      mechanical stream power in W

    • getAcousticalEfficiency

      public double getAcousticalEfficiency()
      Returns the acoustical efficiency factor.
      Returns:
      acoustical efficiency (dimensionless)

    • getSoundPowerInternal

      public double getSoundPowerInternal()
      Returns the internal sound power.
      Returns:
      internal sound power in W

    • getTransmissionLoss

      public double getTransmissionLoss()
      Returns the pipe-wall transmission loss.
      Returns:
      transmission loss in dB

    • toJson

      Serializes the calculation results to a pretty-printed JSON string.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the results
